## Validation

- [ ] `python scripts/validate_package.py` passes.
- [ ] `skill/SKILL.md` still has valid frontmatter.
- [ ] GA4 standard/recommended/ecommerce claims were checked against official documentation.
- [ ] Native, recommended, ecommerce, custom, and implementation variables are clearly classified.
- [ ] Custom events are justified by business or diagnostic needs, not just UI clicks.
- [ ] Workbook changes remain readable for analysts, developers, media teams, QA, and stakeholders.
- [ ] No secrets, PII, or private client data are included.
